title: polystichum capense
intro: Polystichum capense, also known as the Cape fern, is a species of flowering plant in the family Dryopteridaceae, characterized by its evergreen fronds and terrestrial growth habit. Traditionally, this plant has been used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Polystichum capense are attributed to its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestive health, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant are often made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are used to treat various ailments, including fever, coughs, and respiratory issues.
